turns.text:
Anthem, Atlanta, GA                                                                                                                                                                         2016
Customer Care Representative III

Situation: As a Customer Care Representative, I was responsible for responding to customer inquiries and providing professional service to assigned groups, as well as other groups with Client as needed.
Task: My tasks included referring potential abuse, subrogation, and adjustment claims, preparing written correspondence and verbal information to members, group contacts, agents, and healthcare providers, and obtaining necessary documentation for billing and audit purposes. 
Action: With an accuracy rate of 98%, I successfully referred potential abuse, subrogation, and adjustment claims. I also prepared an average of 100 written correspondences and verbal information weekly, while efficiently handling more than 20 calls per day. Additionally, I introduced a process for clerical intake on newly introduced software Leave Source, reducing errors and processing time by 30%. 
Result: My efforts achieved a satisfaction rating of 95% from customers, and a decrease in claims processing time.

Blue Cross Blue Shield, Morrow, GA	2016
Licensed Life and Health Insurance Agent 

Situation: As a Licensed Life and Health Insurance Agent, I was responsible for identifying the needs of Medicare prospects, answering questions, addressing concerns, recommending appropriate plans, and enrolling retirees onto selected Medicare Health Insurance, prescription drug, vision, and dental plans. 
Task: My responsibilities included managing a book of business to ensure all retirees' needs were met on a timely basis. 
Action: Using a needs-based selling approach, I successfully identified the needs of Medicare prospects, achieving a 40% increase in enrollment. I also enrolled retirees compliantly and efficiently with an accuracy rate of 98%, while managing their needs on a timely basis. 
Result: My contribution achieved a 90% retention rate and ensured customer satisfaction and loyalty.

TJ Maxx, Morrow, GA 	2011 – 2016
Customer Experience Coordinator 2012-2016
Cash Office Coordinator 2014-2016
Sales Associate 2011-2012

Situation: As a Customer Experience Coordinator, Cash Office Coordinator, and Sales Associate, I was responsible for improving store operations, cash handling, customer service, and sales revenue.
Task: I was responsible for coaching, mentoring, and training the front-line cashier team, managing all aspects of cash handling and balancing of register funds, handling administrative cash office duties, steering customer engagement and promoting the TJX Rewards Credit Card program to customers, and creatively merchandising front-of-store features.
Action: Using my communication and leadership skills, I efficiently streamlined financial processes and introduced process improvements enhancing productivity by 25%. I applied sound business acumen to manage all aspects of cash handling and ensure a 100% accuracy rate, while coaching, mentoring, and training a front-line cashier team to achieve a 20% increase in accuracy and efficiency with exceptional customer service resulting in a 95% overall satisfaction rating. Through my effective time management, I handled administrative cash office duties averaging 50 per week. I steered customer engagement and fostered superior customer service initiatives, promoting the TJX Rewards Credit Card program to customers resulting in a 30% increase in sign-ups and providing an overall shopping satisfaction rating of 95%. Lastly, my creativity and ability to merchandise front-of-store features contributed to a 15% increase in sales and sales revenue, achieving sales goals with a 20% increase in revenue.
Result: My efforts resulted in increased productivity, reduced errors, and increased customer satisfaction, while achieving sales revenue and maintaining operational compliance.

Rue 21, Fayetteville, GA 	 2011
Sales Associate

Situation: As a Sales Associate, I was responsible for increasing sales revenue and providing customer service to visiting store clients.
Task: I was responsible for front-of-store merchandising, visual marketing effects, and demonstrating leadership throughout the store by using strong communication skills.
Action: I creatively merchandised front-of-store features, resulting in a 10% increase in sales. I provided customer service to visiting store clients with a satisfaction rating of 95% by responding to customer inquiries and needs. Using my communication skills, I demonstrated leadership throughout the store, contributing to an increase in team productivity. I was also an instrumental team player with all store initiatives and sales goals, contributing to a 20% increase in sales revenue. 
Result: My efforts resulted in increased sales revenue and customer satisfaction while maintaining operational compliance.

Blue Cross Blue Shield, Morrow, GA – 2016
Licensed Life and Health Insurance Agent

Situation: As a Licensed Life and Health Insurance Agent, my primary job was to enroll retirees compliantly and efficiently onto selected Medicare Health Insurance, prescription drug, vision, and dental plans while ensuring that all retirees' needs were met on a timely basis.

Action:  I achieved a 40% increase in enrollment through a needs-based selling approach, accurately answering questions, addressing concerns, and recommending the appropriate plan. I also enrolled retirees compliantly and efficiently with an accuracy rate of 98%, ensuring that all retirees' needs were met in a timely manner. Additionally, I proactively managed a book of business to ensure customer satisfaction and loyalty.
Result: My contribution resulted in a 90% retention rate and increased customer satisfaction.

TJ Maxx, Morrow, GA – 2011-2016
Customer Experience Coordinator 2012-2016, Cash Office Coordinator 2014-2016, Sales Associate 2011-2012

Situation: I held various positions at TJ Maxx, where I was responsible for streamlining financial processes, balancing register funds, handling administrative cash office duties, coaching front-line cashier team, fostering customer engagement, creative merchandising, and achieving sales goals.
Task: My tasks were to manage all aspects of cash handling, balance register funds, coach the front-line cashier team, handle administrative cash office duties, creatively merchandise front-of-store features, and promote TJX Rewards Credit Card program to customers.
Action: Using effective communication and leadership skills, I streamlined the financial processes, introduced process improvements enhancing productivity, and used sound business acumen to ensure accurate cash handling resulting in a 100% accuracy rate.  I coached, mentored, and trained the front-line cashier team, which contributed to enhancing the accuracy and efficiency by 20%, and securing exceptional customer service, which garnered a satisfaction rating of 95%. With effective time management, I successfully handled administrative cash office duties averaging 50 per week. Finally, my creative ability to merchandise front-of-store features resulted in a 15% increase in sales, achieving sales goals with a 20% increase in revenue.
Result: My involvement in the operations resulted in increased productivity which reduced errors, and increased customer satisfaction, while achieving sales revenue.
